---
title: "#tab_polls"
format: gfm
---


## 2020-10-01

*11:20:27 - @Vince Carey has joined the channel*
**Vince Carey** (11:20:27):
> set the channel description: polling for TAB discussion

*11:25:03 - @Simple Poll has joined the channel*
**Unknown User** (11:28:37):
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: context]

*11:31:38 - @Levi Waldron has joined the channel*
*11:31:38 - @Charlotte Soneson has joined the channel*
*14:32:55 - @Aedin Culhane has joined the channel*

## 2020-10-02

*17:39:44 - @Laurent Gatto has joined the channel*

## 2020-12-12

*00:38:04 - @Huipeng Li has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-11

*16:46:04 - @Megha Lal has joined the channel*

## 2022-01-28

*11:12:57 - @Megha Lal has left the channel*

## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (10:12:30):
> archived the channel
